title: FATHER TAAFFE HOMES - 211info
text: CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES OF THE MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY AND CENTRAL COAST FATHER TAAFFE HOMES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides maternity homes and transitional housing services. 3737 Portland Road NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Pregnant or parenting women ages 13-20 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm by appointment only Email (503) 508-3030 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 390-2600 Main phone (855) 895-7189 FAX Main phone (503) 508-3030 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for information or to schedule an appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-4:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of Portland Road and Bill Frey Drive. Located on Portland Road, south of I-5. Services: Maternity Homes Post Pregnancy Shelter/Transitional Housing Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FOSTERING HOPE INITIATIVE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
